normalizationRule: lowercase; replace & with and; replace non-alphanumeric with hyphen; trim leading/trailing hyphens
dataNotes: Most hole-by-hole yardage/par/HCP data was transcribed from official Pinehurst course pages.
The Cradle hole-by-hole yardage is from 18Birdies; Pinehurst official page confirms total yardage/par/opening year.
No. 11 is included as a future-course placeholder.

pinehurst-no-9.name: Pinehurst No. 9
pinehurst-no-9.notes: Pinehurst page states No. 9 is closed for renovations until August 2026.

the-cradle.name: The Cradle
the-cradle.notes: Pinehurst official page confirms total yardage/par/opening year; hole-by-hole yardages are from 18Birdies because Pinehurst page did not expose a hole table in the available text.

pinehurst-no-11.name: Pinehurst No. 11
pinehurst-no-11.notes: Future course. Pinehurst listed opening year 2027 with par/yardage N/A at time of library creation.
